hypothesis: If EfficientNet-B0 is first pretrained on additive-free NCM SEM images and then fine-tuned on a small additive-induced SEM dataset with class rebalancing, then it will achieve higher accuracy and F1 in classifying nine NCM composition–aging classes than models trained only on the target data or only on the source data because transferable microstructural features (e.g., cracking and surface boundaries) are shared across domains.
